title: Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu - Chapter 4 - Sensing (live, unedited)
summary: CS50 is Harvard University's introduction to computer science course. This video is Chapter 4 on Sensing from the "Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu" module, presented as a live unedited lecture.
writeup: This is Chapter 4, Sensing, from CS50's "Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Brian Yu," presented as a live, unedited lecture from Harvard University's introduction to computer science course. The chapter covers how AI systems take in and interpret the world, spanning computer vision, sensor data, and the economics of AI. It sits within a structured module, building on earlier chapters in the series.
